ast.name: log
ast.source: blockier: falling back to selecting closest live preview element
ast.target: blockier: 回退到选择最近的实时预览元素

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to override ctrl/cmd-A for the Select block command. Disable this and set a hotkey in hotkey settings if you prefer a different hotkey. Reload required.
ast.target: 是否为“选择块”命令覆盖 ctrl/cmd-A。如果您希望使用不同的快捷键，请禁用此选项并在快捷键设置中设置一个快捷键。需要重新加载。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether the Select block command will avoid selecting block prefixes.
ast.target: “选择块”命令是否避免选择块前缀。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether the Select block command will select everything if the new selection would be unchanged.
ast.target: 如果新选择将保持不变，“选择块”命令是否选择所有内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether the Select block command will select the entire code block when the cursor is inside one.
ast.target: 当光标位于代码块内时，“选择块”命令是否选择整个代码块。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Replaces the block type if you enter the prefix at the start of the paragraph.
ast.target: 如果您在段落开头输入前缀，则替换块类型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to show suggestions of checkbox variants supported by your theme. Reload required.
ast.target: 是否显示您的主题支持的复选框变体建议。需要重新加载。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Which checkboxes to be shown in the suggestion. These should be supported by your theme. Each character will be one suggestion.
ast.target: 建议中显示哪些复选框。这些应由您的主题支持。每个字符将是一个建议。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to show suggestions of callout variants supported by your theme. Reload required.
ast.target: 是否显示您的主题支持的标注变体建议。需要重新加载。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Which callouts to be shown in the suggestion. Separate by commas.
ast.target: 建议中显示哪些标注。用逗号分隔。
